title: Audit and fix same slot dedup bug in lib/raidbots.ts import pipeline
description:
FOLLOW-ON from main-h2r: lib/raidbots.ts contains identical slot deduplication logic (lines 254-265) that suffers the same bug as voidcore.ts. The bestBySlot map (line 257) keeps only one item per slot string, which would eliminate a legitimate upgrade trinket if two trinkets from the same dungeon both happen to have their best sim in trinket2.

The raidbots.ts pipeline powers the main /page import flow (the base64 import string sent to the WoW addon). If a dungeon has two trinkets and the same conditions apply (trinket2 sim wins for both), one will be silently dropped from the import payload.

ACTION: Apply the same fix approach used for main-h2r to raidbots.ts. The slot dedup at lines 254-265 should only deduplicate within catalyst/base-item pairs, not across all items per slot. This file should be fixed in the same PR as the voidcore.ts fix to keep both pipelines in sync.

Assuming this fix is best done by the same dev agent handling main-h2r since the change is nearly identical — revisit if separation is needed.
close_reason: Fixed in both lib/voidcore.ts and lib/raidbots.ts — slot dedup now only resolves catalyst vs non-catalyst conflicts, not all items sharing a slot string

title: Fix slot dedup incorrectly eliminating independent same-slot items on voidcore page
description:
BUG: On the /voidcore page, Heart of Wind (item 250256, +438 DPS) from Windrunner Spire is missing from the roll targets list. Only Emberwing Feather (+1.7k) appears even though both trinkets are upgrades.

ROOT CAUSE (lib/voidcore.ts lines 207-228, 413-426):
The upsert function stores items keyed by (targetKey, itemId) and keeps only the highest-gain profileset per item. For trinkets, the same item is simmed in both trinket1 and trinket2 slots — whichever yields higher DPS wins and becomes the stored slot for that item:
- Emberwing Feather (250144): trinket2 sim wins at +1,724 DPS → stored slot='trinket2'
- Heart of Wind (250256): trinket2 sim wins at +438 DPS (trinket1 was -267, filtered) → stored slot='trinket2'

Slot deduplication (lines 413-426) then sees TWO items both tagged slot='trinket2' and keeps only the winner (Emberwing Feather), silently dropping Heart of Wind.

INTENT vs REALITY:
The slot dedup comment at line 409 says its purpose is to prevent 'a base item and its catalyzed version' (different itemIds, same slot) both appearing. It was never designed to eliminate two completely distinct items that each happen to have their best trinket sim in trinket2.

FIX: The slot dedup should only apply when an item pair is a base+catalyst relationship (isCatalyst=true with a corresponding non-catalyst version). For all other cases, multiple items of the same slot type (e.g. two trinkets) should all appear in the list. The simplest safe fix is to remove or narrow the cross-item slot dedup: since trinket1 and trinket2 are already tracked as separate slots by the upsert, all items with dpsGain >= 100 for any slot should survive. If slot dedup is kept at all, it should only compare items sharing the exact same (slot, isCatalyst-pair) relation.

ALSO AFFECTS: lib/raidbots.ts has identical slot dedup logic (lines 257-265) which may produce the same bug on the main /page import flow.

Reproduce: use report https://www.raidbots.com/simbot/report/o83ydvPzFrPFTbncxzs2zi on /voidcore page. Windrunner Spire should show both Emberwing Feather (+1.7k) and Heart of Wind (+438) but only Emberwing Feather appears.
close_reason: Fixed in both lib/voidcore.ts and lib/raidbots.ts — slot dedup now only resolves catalyst vs non-catalyst conflicts, not all items sharing a slot string

title: Create app/voidcore/page.tsx Voidcore Advisor page
description: New Next.js page at /voidcore. Two URL inputs (M+ and Raid droptimizer URLs, both optional but at least one required). Single Analyze button. Amber caveat box about bad luck protection not being modeled. Combined ranked results list with RollTarget cards showing type badge (M+/Raid), dungeon/boss name, voidcore cost, top item with icon/name/slot/ilvl/dpsGain, dps-per-voidcore, and expandable list of other items in the pool. Uses existing Button/Input/Card/Badge components.

title: Create lib/voidcore.ts with VoidcoreAdvisor parsing logic
description: New library file with fetchAndParseForVoidcore(), RollTarget/VoidcoreItem/VoidcoreAdvisorResult interfaces. M+ groups by dungeon (1 voidcore), Raid groups by boss (2 voidcores). Catalyst items included in their source dungeon/boss pool. Combined results sorted by dpsPerVoidcore desc. Requires extending RBData interface to include rawFormData for report type detection.

title: Add regression test coverage for same-dungeon multi-trinket scenarios
description:
After main-h2r and main-6kn are fixed, add test coverage to prevent regressions of the slot dedup bug.

SCENARIO TO COVER: A dungeon has two distinct trinkets (trinket1/trinket2). Both have positive DPS gains. Both happen to have their best sim in the same slot (e.g. both win in trinket2). After the fix, both should appear in the output. Before the fix, one was silently dropped.

REFERENCE CASE: Windrunner Spire (instanceId=1299) with:
- Emberwing Feather (250144): trinket2=+1724, trinket1=+359
- Heart of Wind (250256): trinket2=+438, trinket1=-267

The fix in voidcore.ts should result in both appearing under Windrunner Spire targets. The fix in raidbots.ts should result in both appearing in the import payload.

Note: there are currently no unit tests in this project. If tests are added, they can use mock data shaped like the Raidbots data.json structure. Check AGENTS.md for quality gates — currently only npm run build must pass.

title: Add Voidcore Advisor nav link to home page
description: Add a navigation link to /voidcore in the top-right nav cluster of app/page.tsx, alongside the existing Wago/CurseForge install links.
close_reason: Added nav link to home page
